templates.questionEn: What is the place value of {digit} in {num}?
templates.questionMs: Apakah nilai tempat bagi {digit} dalam {num}?

templates.questionEn: What is the digit value of the underlined digit {underlined} in {num}?
templates.questionMs: Apakah nilai digit bagi digit yang bergaris {underlined} dalam {num}?

vars.val: underlined === Math.floor(hundreds/100) ? hundreds : (underlined === Math.floor(tens/10) ? tens : ones)

template.questionEn:
Write this number in words:
{num}
template.questionMs:
Tulis nombor ini dalam perkataan:
{num}

vars.wordsEn: num === 120 ? 'one hundred and twenty' : (num === 245 ? 'two hundred and forty-five' : (num === 308 ? 'three hundred and eight' : (num === 450 ? 'four hundred and fifty' : (num === 515 ? 'five hundred and fifteen' : (num === 672 ? 'six hundred and seventy-two' : (num === 703 ? 'seven hundred and three' : (num === 899 ? 'eight hundred and ninety-nine' : 'nine hundred and thirty')))))))
vars.wordsMs: num === 120 ? 'satu ratus dua puluh' : (num === 245 ? 'dua ratus empat puluh lima' : (num === 308 ? 'tiga ratus lapan' : (num === 450 ? 'empat ratus lima puluh' : (num === 515 ? 'lima ratus lima belas' : (num === 672 ? 'enam ratus tujuh puluh dua' : (num === 703 ? 'tujuh ratus tiga' : (num === 899 ? 'lapan ratus sembilan puluh sembilan' : 'sembilan ratus tiga puluh')))))))

template.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ 'one hundred and twenty / satu ratus dua puluh', 'two hundred and forty-five / dua ratus empat puluh lima', 'three hundred and eight / tiga ratus lapan', 'four hundred and fifty / empat ratus lima puluh', 'five hundred and fifteen / lima ratus lima belas', 'six hundred and seventy-two / enam ratus tujuh puluh dua', 'seven hundred and three / tujuh ratus tiga', 'eight hundred and ninety-nine / lapan ratus sembilan puluh sembilan' ])

vars.val: underlined === Math.floor(thousands/1000) ? thousands : (underlined === Math.floor(hundreds/100) ? hundreds : (underlined === Math.floor(tens/10) ? tens : ones))

templates.questionEn: What is the place value of {digit} in {num}?

vars.placeEn: digit === Math.floor(tenthousands/10000) ? 'ten thousands' : (digit === Math.floor(thousands/1000) ? 'thousands' : (digit === Math.floor(hundreds/100) ? 'hundreds' : (digit === Math.floor(tens/10) ? 'tens' : 'ones')))
vars.placeMs: digit === Math.floor(tenthousands/10000) ? 'puluh ribu' : (digit === Math.floor(thousands/1000) ? 'ribu' : (digit === Math.floor(hundreds/100) ? 'ratus' : (digit === Math.floor(tens/10) ? 'puluh' : 'sa')))

templates.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ 'ten thousands / puluh ribu', 'thousands / ribu', 'hundreds / ratus', 'tens / puluh', 'ones / sa' ])

templates.questionEn: What is the digit value of the underlined digit {underlined} in {num}?
templates.questionMs: Apakah nilai digit bagi digit yang bergaris {underlined} dalam {num}?

vars.val: underlined === Math.floor(tenthousands/10000) ? tenthousands : (underlined === Math.floor(thousands/1000) ? thousands : (underlined === Math.floor(hundreds/100) ? hundreds : (underlined === Math.floor(tens/10) ? tens : ones)))

templates.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ String(tenthousands), String(thousands), String(hundreds), String(tens), String(ones) ])

vars.ans: diffHours + ' hours ' + minute + ' minutes / ' + diffHours + ' jam ' + minute + ' minit'

template.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ (diffHours - 1) + ' hours ' + minute + ' minutes / ' + (diffHours - 1) + ' jam ' + minute + ' minit', diffHours + ' hours 00 minutes / ' + diffHours + ' jam 00 minit', (diffHours + 1) + ' hours ' + minute + ' minutes / ' + (diffHours + 1) + ' jam ' + minute + ' minit' ])

templates.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ String((days + 1) * 24) + ' hours / ' + String((days + 1) * 24) + ' jam', String(days * 12) + ' hours / ' + String(days * 12) + ' jam', '48 hours / 48 jam' ])

vars.ans: ansH + ' hours ' + ansM + ' minutes / ' + ansH + ' jam ' + ansM + ' minit'

templates.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ (ansH + 1) + ' hours ' + ansM + ' minutes / ' + (ansH + 1) + ' jam ' + ansM + ' minit', ansH + ' hours ' + (ansM === 0 ? 30 : 0) + ' minutes / ' + ansH + ' jam ' + (ansM === 0 ? 30 : 0) + ' minit' ])

templates.questionEn: How long is it from 10:30 AM to 2:15 PM?

Objek manakah yang biasanya lebih panjang:
{item1Ms} atau {item2Ms}?
template.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ 'eraser / pemadam', 'paperclip / klip kertas', 'ant / semut', 'car / kereta', 'bicycle / basikal', 'shoe / kasut', 'leaf / daun', 'pencil / pensil' ])

template.questionEn:
Which object is heavier:
a {item1} or a {item2}?
template.questionMs:
Objek manakah yang lebih berat:
{item1Ms} atau {item2Ms}?
template.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ 'balloon / belon', 'feather / bulu pelepah', 'leaf / daun', 'paper / kertas', 'pencil / pensil', 'pillow / bantal', 'coin / syiling', 'mouse / tikus' ])

template.questionEn: Which measurement unit is best for the length of a {itemEn}?
template.questionMs: Unit ukuran manakah yang paling sesuai untuk panjang bagi {itemMs}?

template.questionEn: Which measurement unit is best for the mass of a {itemEn}?
template.questionMs: Unit ukuran manakah yang paling sesuai untuk jisim bagi {itemMs}?

template.questionEn: Which measurement unit is best for the capacity of a {itemEn}?
template.questionMs: Unit ukuran manakah yang paling sesuai untuk kapasiti bagi {itemMs}?

vars.itemEn: ['large bucket of water', 'spoon of syrup', 'bathtub', 'cup of tea', 'swimming pool', 'small juice box'][idx]
vars.itemMs: ['baldi air besar', 'sudu sirap', 'tab mandi', 'secawan teh', 'kolam renang', 'kotak jus kecil'][idx]

variations.logic: Length conversions (m vs cm, km vs m)

templates.questionEn: Convert {m} meters to centimeters:
templates.questionMs: Tukarkan {m} meter kepada sentimeter:
templates.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ String(m) + ' cm', String(m * 10) + ' cm', String(m * 1000) + ' cm' ])

templates.questionEn: Convert {km} kilometers to meters:
templates.questionMs: Tukarkan {km} kilometer kepada meter:
templates.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ String(km) + ' m', String(km * 100) + ' m', String(km * 10) + ' m' ])

template.questionEn: Convert {val} {unitEn1} to {unitEn2}:
template.questionMs: Tukarkan {val} {unitMs1} kepada {unitMs2}:
template.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ String(val) + ' ' + unitLabel, String(val * 100) + ' ' + unitLabel, String(val * 10) + ' ' + unitLabel ])

templates.questionEn: Convert {m} meters to centimeters:
templates.questionMs: Tukarkan {m} meter kepada sentimeter:
templates.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ String(m * 10) + ' cm', String(m * 1000) + ' cm', String(m) + ' cm' ])

templates.questionEn: Convert {L} Liters to milliliters:
templates.questionMs: Tukarkan {L} Liter kepada mililiter:
templates.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ String(L * 100) + ' mL', String(L) + ' mL', String(L * 10) + ' mL' ])

templates.questionEn: Convert {val} kg to grams:
templates.questionMs: Tukarkan {val} kg kepada gram:
templates.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ String(val * 100) + ' g', String(val * 10) + ' g', String(ans + 100) + ' g' ])

templates.questionEn: A car travels a distance of {dist} km in {time} hours. What is its average speed?
templates.questionMs: Sebuah kereta bergerak sejauh {dist} km dalam masa {time} jam. Apakah kelajuan puratanya?
templates.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ String(speed - 10) + ' km/h / ' + String(speed - 10) + ' km/j', String(speed + 10) + ' km/h / ' + String(speed + 10) + ' km/j', String(dist) + ' km/h / ' + String(dist) + ' km/j' ])

template.questionEn: How many straight sides does this shape have?
template.questionMs: Berapakah bilangan sisi lurus bagi bentuk ini?

template.questionEn: What is the name of this shape?
template.questionMs: Apakah nama bagi bentuk ini?
template.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ 'Circle / Bulatan', 'Triangle / Segitiga', 'Square / Segi empat sama', 'Rectangle / Segi empat tepat', 'Pentagon / Pentagon', 'Hexagon / Heksagon' ])

template.questionEn: Can a {shapeEn} roll down a slide?
template.questionMs: Adakah {shapeMs} boleh bergolek ke bawah gelongsor?
template.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ canRoll === 'yes' ? 'no / tidak' : 'yes / ya', 'maybe / mungkin', 'sometimes / kadang-kadang' ])

template.questionEn: Can you stack a {shapeEn} on top of another?
template.questionMs: Bolehkah anda menyusun {shapeMs} di atas satu sama lain?
template.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ canStack === 'yes' ? 'no / tidak' : 'yes / ya', 'maybe / mungkin', 'sometimes / kadang-kadang' ])

template.questionEn: How many flat faces does a {shapeEn} have?
template.questionMs: Berapakah bilangan muka rata bagi sebuah {shapeMs}?

template.questionEn: Which shape is formed by cutting a circle exactly in half?
template.questionMs: Bentuk manakah yang terhasil apabila memotong bulatan kepada dua bahagian yang sama rata?
template.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ 'Quarter circle / Suku bulatan', 'Triangle / Segitiga', 'Square / Segi empat sama' ])

template.questionEn: Which angle is smaller than a right angle?
template.questionMs: Sudut manakah yang lebih kecil daripada sudut tegak?
template.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ 'Obtuse angle / Sudut cakah', 'Right angle / Sudut tegak', 'Straight angle / Sudut lurus' ])

template.questionEn: Which lines never cross each other and remain the same distance apart?
template.questionMs: Garisan manakah yang tidak akan bersilang dan sentiasa berjarak sama?
template.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ 'Perpendicular lines / Garisan serenjang', 'Intersecting lines / Garisan bersilang', 'Horizontal lines / Garisan mengufuk' ])

templates.questionEn: Find the area of a rectangle with length {l} cm and width {w} cm:
templates.questionMs: Cari luas bagi segi empat tepat dengan panjang {l} cm dan lebar {w} cm:
templates.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ String(2 * (l + w)) + ' cm²', String(l * w + 5) + ' cm²', String(l * w - 5) + ' cm²' ])

templates.questionEn: How many lines of symmetry does a regular square have?
templates.questionMs: Berapakah bilangan paksi simetri bagi sebuah segi empat sama?

templates.questionEn: Find the volume of a cuboid with length {l} cm, width {w} cm, and height {h} cm:
templates.questionMs: Cari isi padu bagi sebuah kuboid dengan panjang {l} cm, lebar {w} cm, dan tinggi {h} cm:
templates.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ String(l * w + h) + ' cm³', String(ans + 10) + ' cm³', String(ans - 10) + ' cm³' ])

templates.questionEn: Find the missing angle x on a straight line if the other angle is {angle}°:
templates.questionMs: Cari sudut x yang tertinggal pada garis lurus jika sudut yang satu lagi ialah {angle}°:
templates.distractors: scrambleChoices(ans, [ String(360 - angle) + '°', String(90 - angle) + '°', String(ans + 10) + '°' ])

templates.questionEn: What is the sum of the interior angles of a quadrilateral (4-sided shape)?
templates.questionMs: Apakah jumlah sudut pedalaman bagi sebuah segi empat (bentuk 4 sisi)?

templates.questionEn:
Simplify this expression:
3a + 5b - a + 2b
templates.questionMs:
Permudahkan ungkapan ini:
3a + 5b - a + 2b

template.questionEn: Look at the pictograph. How many {targetEn}s are there?
template.questionMs: Rujuk piktograf. Berapakah bilangan {targetMs}?

template.questionEn: Look at the bar graph. If each block represents {scale} books, how many books does {name} have with {blocks} blocks?
template.questionMs: Rujuk graf bar. Jika setiap blok mewakili {scale} buah buku, berapakah bilangan buku yang dimiliki oleh {name} yang mempunyai {blocks} blok?

template.questionEn: Look at the pictograph. If each key represents {scale} items, how many items are there in total if the graph has {blocks} keys?
template.questionMs: Rujuk piktograf. Jika setiap petunjuk mewakili {scale} barangan, berapakah jumlah barangan kesemuanya jika graf mempunyai {blocks} petunjuk?

templates.questionEn: A bar graph shows Class A has {a} books and Class B has {b} books. How many more books does Class A have?
templates.questionMs: Graf bar menunjukkan Kelas A ada {a} buku dan Kelas B ada {b} buku. Berapakah lebihnya buku Kelas A?

templates.questionEn: Find the average (mean) of: {v1}, {v2}, {v3}, and {v4}:
templates.questionMs: Cari purata (min) bagi: {v1}, {v2}, {v3}, dan {v4}:

templates.questionEn: A pie chart shows sports preferences of {total} pupils. If {percent}% prefer football, how many pupils prefer football?
templates.questionMs: Carta pai menunjukkan sukan kegemaran bagi {total} orang murid. Jika {percent}% memilih bola sepak, berapakah bilangan murid yang memilih bola sepak?
